interfaces.name: getHomeHighlights
interfaces.description: Get featured waxing services, packages, and promotions for the homepage hero and highlight sections.

interfaces.name: getQuickBookOptions
interfaces.description: Return a small set of popular services with their next available time slots for the homepage 'Book Now' call-to-action.

next_available_start_datetime.description: ISO 8601 datetime for the next available appointment start

technician.description: Technician assigned for the quick-book slot, if applicable

interfaces.name: getServiceFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the Waxing Services and Build Your Own Session pages (areas, durations, price ranges, sort options).

label.description: User-facing label, e.g., 'Up to 30 min', '45 min and up'
Label for sort option, e.g., 'Price: Low to High'

interfaces.name: listWaxingServices
interfaces.description: List waxing services for the Waxing Services and Build Your Own Session pages with filters and sorting applied.

areaKey.description: Filter by specific area key, e.g., 'full_leg', 'brazilian', 'eyebrow'

isMajorAreaOnly.description: If true, only show major areas (e.g., brazilian, full_leg, full_back)

onlyActive.description: If true, only include active services

interfaces.name: getServiceDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific waxing service including description, price, duration, and suggested add-ons.

interfaces.name: getServiceAvailability
interfaces.description: Get available time slots for a specific service on a given date or using a search mode such as earliest_available, next_week, or same_day.

parameters.name: technicianId
parameters.description: Optional technician filter when availability depends on technician choice

date.description: Resolved date for which slots are returned

start_datetime.description: ISO 8601 start datetime for the slot

end_datetime.description: ISO 8601 end datetime for the slot

interfaces.name: bookServiceAppointment
interfaces.description: Create an appointment for a single service at a specific date/time (and optional technician) and add it to the current cart/booking summary.

parameters.name: startDateTime
parameters.description: Selected start time in ISO 8601 format, e.g., '2026-05-13T14:30:00'

parameters.name: technicianId
parameters.description: Technician chosen for this appointment, if applicable

interfaces.name: getTechniciansForService
interfaces.description: List technicians that can perform a given service, for technician selection on booking pages.

interfaces.name: addServiceToCurrentSession
interfaces.description: Add a service to the current custom session or pending multi-service appointment (used by Build Your Own Session and quick add from Waxing Services/Men’s Waxing).

session.description: Current session after adding the service

interfaces.name: removeServiceFromCurrentSession
interfaces.description: Remove a specific line item from the current custom session (e.g., to stay under a budget or change composition).

interfaces.name: getCurrentSessionState
interfaces.description: Get the current custom session being built, including its services, total duration, and total price.

interfaces.name: getCurrentSessionAvailability
interfaces.description: Get available time slots for the current custom session (combined duration of all included services) for a given date or search mode.

parameters.name: technicianId
parameters.description: Optional technician filter when scheduling the session with a specific technician

interfaces.name: bookCustomSessionAppointment
interfaces.description: Create a single appointment for the current custom session at the selected time and add it to the cart/booking summary.

parameters.name: startDateTime
parameters.description: Selected start time in ISO 8601 format

parameters.name: technicianId
parameters.description: Technician chosen for this session, if applicable

session.description: Session that was scheduled for this appointment

interfaces.name: getPackageFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for waxing packages.

label.description: User-friendly label for the package type

interfaces.name: listWaxingPackages
interfaces.description: List waxing packages with filters and sorting applied for the Waxing Packages page.

interfaces.name: getPackageDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific waxing package including included services, durations, and promotion eligibility hints.

items.description: Human-readable hints, e.g., 'Eligible for 10% off package promo on orders over $100'

interfaces.name: getPackageAvailability
interfaces.description: Get available time slots for a specific waxing package on a given date or using a search mode.

interfaces.name: bookPackageAppointment
interfaces.description: Create an appointment for a selected package at a specific date/time and add it to the cart/booking summary.

parameters.name: startDateTime
parameters.description: Selected start time in ISO 8601 format

parameters.name: technicianId
parameters.description: Technician chosen for this package, if applicable

interfaces.name: getProductFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the Shop Products page, including categories, price, rating, and fulfillment modes.

interfaces.name: listProducts
interfaces.description: List products for the Shop Products page with category, price, rating, and fulfillment filters applied.

onlyFreeInStorePickup.description: If true, only show products with free in-store pickup

interfaces.name: getProductDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific product, including description, ingredients, usage, rating, and fulfillment options.

interfaces.name: addProductToCart
interfaces.description: Add a product to the current cart with a specified quantity, creating the cart if needed.

interfaces.name: getGiftCardTemplates
interfaces.description: List available gift card types for the Gift Cards page, optionally filtered by usage type.

interfaces.name: getGiftCardTemplateDetails
interfaces.description: Get details for a specific gift card template, including allowed amounts and usage restrictions.

interfaces.name: createGiftCardPurchaseAndAddToCart
interfaces.description: Configure a gift card purchase (amount, recipient, delivery schedule) and add it as a line item to the cart.

parameters.name: scheduledSendDate
parameters.description: Scheduled send date when sendTiming = 'schedule_for_later', in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format

interfaces.name: getActivePromotions
interfaces.description: Get all active promotions/offers for the Offers & Promotions page, optionally filtered by target type.

interfaces.name: applyPromoCode
interfaces.description: Apply a promo code to the current cart and return the resulting applied promotion information.

interfaces.name: getCartSummary
interfaces.description: Get the current cart and booking summary including all appointments, products, gift cards, totals, and applied promotions.

gift_card_purchase.description: Gift card purchase details when item_type = 'gift_card'

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove a single cart item (appointment, product, or gift card) from the current cart.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a cart item (primarily used for products or gift cards).

interfaces.name: updateAppointmentSchedule
interfaces.description: Adjust the scheduled time and/or technician for an existing appointment in the cart/booking summary.

parameters.name: newStartDateTime
parameters.description: New start datetime in ISO 8601 format

interfaces.name: getCheckoutSummary
interfaces.description: Get a read-only summary of the current cart for the Checkout page, including items, appointments, totals, and applied promotions.

interfaces.name: saveCheckoutContactInfo
interfaces.description: Save customer contact information and notification preferences during checkout (no payment processing).

interfaces.name: submitContactRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a general contact form request from the Contact page.

interfaces.name: getSalonAboutInfo
interfaces.description: Get salon story, approach to waxing, hygiene standards, and specializations for the About page.

interfaces.name: getTechnicianProfiles
interfaces.description: List active technicians with bios and specialties for use on the About and technician selection views.

interfaces.name: getContactInfo
interfaces.description: Get salon contact information for the Contact page, including address, map context, phone, email, and opening hours.

map_embed_reference.description: Identifier or reference used by the UI to render a map (not a URL)

interfaces.name: getPoliciesContent
interfaces.description: Get policy content for the Policies page, such as booking, cancellation, refund, privacy, and terms.

content.description: Full text or HTML-safe content of the policy

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the current cart from storage or create a new one if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCurrentSession
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize the current custom session used for Build Your Own Session and multi-service selections.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recompute cart subtotal, tax, total, and promotion effects after any cart change.

helperFunctions.name: _checkAvailability
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to validate that a requested appointment time slot is still available for the given service/session/package and technician.

helperFunctions.name: _applyPromotionToCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to evaluate promotion rules against the current cart and create/update AppliedPromotion records.
